Serra Service
Hi! I'm Nancy with Serra Service. I can help with maintenance, recalls, and scheduling your next service appointment.
Launch certification test: can you help me schedule service for tomorrow morning?
Yes, I can help with that! May I have your vehicle information and your preferred time tomorrow morning? Also, please let me know if you need a specific service or are coming in for a recall or maintenance.
